{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[spells]].

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following onto a relevant item page.

<pre>{{Infobox Spell
|name =
|image =
|imagesize = 
|release = 
|skill = 
|level = 
|cooldown = 
|runes = 
|description = 
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===name===
The name of the spell.

===image===
An image of the spell.

===imagesize===
The size of the image (if not default). Can be removed.

===release===
The date when the spell was added to the game. Need to add as plain text, no link tags needed.

===update===
The exact name of the update (without the keyword Update:) in which the spell was released.

===skill===
Skill that will unlock the spell at certain level.

===level===
Shows on which level of the skill will the spell unlock.

===cooldown===
Cooldown time of the spell.

===runes===
List of runes needed for the spell. Use the {{t|RuneReq}} template.

===description===
In-game description of the spell.

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
			"type": "string",
            "description": "The name of the spell.",
			"required": true
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
			"description": "An image of the spell.",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"imagesize": {
			"label": "Image",
			"type": "number",
			"description": "The size of the image (if not default). Can be removed.",
            "default": "300"
		},
        "release": {
			"label": "Released",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The date when the spell was added to the game. Need to add as plain text, no link tags needed.",
            "suggested": true
        },
        "update": {
			"label": "Released",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The exact name of the update (without the keyword Update:) in which the spell was released. Always use alongside with update parameter",
            "suggested": true
        },
		"skill": {
			"label": "Skill",
			"type": "string",
            "description": "Skill that will unlock the spell at certain level.",
			"suggestedvalues": [
				"Attack",
				"Magic",
				"Ranged",
                "Mining",
                "Woodcutting",
				"Artisan",
                "Construction",
				"Cooking",
                "Runecrafting"
			],
			"suggested": true
		},
		"level": {
			"label": "Level",
			"type": "number",
			"description": "Shows on which level of the skill will the spell unlock.",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"cooldown": {
			"label": "Cooldown",
			"type": "number",
			"description": "The maximum amount of the item that the player can hold in one inventory slot",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"runes": {
			"label": "Runes",
			"type": "wiki-template-name",
			"description": "List of runes needed for the spell. Use the {{t|RuneReq}} template.",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"description": {
			"label": "Description",
			"type": "string",
			"description": "In-game description of the spell.",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing an item.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
        "imagesize",
        "release",
        "update",
		"skill",
		"level",
        "cooldown",
		"runes",
        "description"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Spell]]</includeonly>
